Off-Market Opportunity  ·  2% Fee to Broker
77–79 Sherman Ave
Jersey City, NJ 07307  ·  The Heights

A 10-unit multifamily asset offered exclusively off-market in Jersey City's Heights neighborhood. Operating at below-market rents across all units with a clear upside story through natural turnover — no renovation required. The current owner acquired five years ago and is capitalizing on significant Heights appreciation. Clean motivation, no distress.

Investment Highlights
Why This Asset
Below-Market Rents — In-Place vs. Market Upside
Studios at $820/mo vs. $1,900 median market. 1BRs averaging $1,313 vs. $2,300. The delta between in-place annual income ($154,024) and market ($220,800+) is captured unit by unit as leases turn through VCIs.
Motivated, Transparent Seller
Owner acquired five years ago, capitalizing on appreciation. Clean motivation, no distress — straightforward transaction for a decisive buyer.
$165K/Unit — Below Comp Basis
Trades below comparable Heights sales and well below replacement cost. Strong downside protection at acquisition.
Tenant Amenities In Place
On-site laundry and storage adds retention value and competitive positioning against newer product at higher rents.
Heights Momentum
One of Jersey City's fastest-appreciating submarkets. Palisade Ave, Fisk Park, Congress St Light Rail, and Journal Square PATH all within reach.
Off-Market — No Broad Process
Offered through Grid. Qualified buyers transact without competitive bidding pressure or public listing exposure.

In-place NOI reflects current occupied rents. Market NOI at full mark-to-market rents (~$220,800 gross) yields estimated NOI of ~$160,950 — a meaningful premium over in-place performance captured unit by unit as leases turn. Buyer to verify all figures independently.

Transit & Location

77–79 Sherman Ave is a 13-minute walk — just 0.6 miles — from the 2nd Street Hudson-Bergen Light Rail Station, providing direct service to Hoboken Terminal, Newport, and Exchange Place. NJ Transit bus routes 87 and 84 run along Palisade Avenue two blocks away, with direct service to Port Authority Bus Terminal in Manhattan.
